title: Cosmic optimizations
description: A optimazations modpack made for being light weight
body:
This modpacks focus is on performance while being light weight. Intended for people who dont have the fastest download speeds so they can play boot up Minecraft fastly and have good performance. 

List of mods being used:

Optimization Mods:
[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (Optimzation Mod), 
[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) (Sodium Addon adding More options to the Options Menu) and 
[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) (Skips rendering for entities that arent in the visible)

Quality of Life Mods:
[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (Adds shader support), 
[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) (Improves the F3 Menu to be more Readable), 
[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (Adds connected texture support to Fabric), 
[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) (Add better model support for texturepacks), 
[Capes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) (Adds capes only avaible in +1.0.1), 
[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) (Adds a zoom feature), 
[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) (Removes Chat Reports) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Adds a Mod Menu)

Libs and APIs:
[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Adds a Config screen API), 
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Adds an Essential API for Fabric), 
[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) (Adds Kotlin support to fabric), 
[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) (Replaces Sodium render with a Indigo based one also Continuity is Dependant on it) and 
[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (Is a Config Library)
